title: Cinnamon no Ouchi de Challenge
titleNative: シナモンの おうちでチャレンジ
synopsis: Cinnamoroll teaches literacy, numbers, food, english, and discipline in a fun way! This OVA features lessons on brushing teeth, eating together, using the toilet, cleaning up neatly, and going to bed on time!

title: The Dangerous Convenience Store
titleNative: 위험한 편의점
synopsis: Eui-joon, a 25-year-old college student, works at a convenience store and faces daily threats from the regular customers, the gangsters. He cannot help but shiver every time he greets them, but the high hourly pay is too good to give up. One day, Eui-joon gets into trouble during his shift, but unexpectedly a man named Gun-woo pulls him out of the situation. As Eui-joon always looks forward to those who stand up for justice, he felt extremely grateful to Gun-woo. Eui-joon recognizes Gun-woo buying alcohol and cigarettes, but ever since Gun-woo bought ‘the thing,’ Eui-joon can't stop thinking about Gun-woo more than ever. (Source: LAFTEL) Note: Episodes 1 and 2 were pilot episodes and may be remade in future production

title: Red Fox
titleNative: 붉은 여우
synopsis: Welcome to Ibana, a beautiful country also known as the red country. Here, lives the red fox, a wily beast who takes on the form of a human and feasts on the livers of humans. For hundreds of years, the fox kills without hesitation until, thanks to one human woman, it comes to know what that human emotion called "love", truly is. Out of the land of fire, erupts the cruel yet tragic love story of one evil spirit who yearns to possess the heart of one human woman. source: ANN note: The first episode was aired on youtube one day before the official Laftel release on 19.05.2025.

title: Akuma to Himegimi
titleNative: 悪魔と姫ぎみ
synopsis: The 18-year-old princess of Tomorrow Castle has a beauty famed far and wide but a less-attractive penchant for daytime drinking. Despite this, she has plenty of suitors, including a devil wearing a cunning disguise. One day, the princess meets Snow White at her teahouse in the forest, and while the girls get acquainted, the devil kidnaps them both. (Source: The Anime Encyclopedia by Jonathan Clements and Helen McCarthy)

tags.name: Shoujo
tags.description: Target demographic is teenage and young adult females.

tags.name: Fairy Tale

title: SHe
titleNative: 女他
synopsis: In a totalitarian and male chauvinist world, a female high-heeled shoe named Mulan Hua rebels against the baby shoe factory to protect her baby girl from being transformed into a male shoe. To raise her daughter, she later has to disguise herself as a male sturdy shoe and works day and night in a capitalist cigarette factory. The story is not only about a mother’s sacrifice and a feminist’s revenge, but also has a political undertone of the intoxication of power. (Source: mulanfestival.com)
